name: Sicilian Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large saucepan of salted water to a boil.
2. Place a plate on top of the pan, covering the water, lay the anchovy fillets on the plate, and mash with a fork. They will dissolve smoothly with the heat.
3. When the anchovies are dissolved, remove the plate.
4. Add the rice to the water and cook until tender, about 45 to 55 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, sauté the onion in 2 tablespoons of olive oil until golden and soft.
6. Sprinkle the white wine vinegar over the onions and allow it to evaporate for 2 minutes.
7. Add the white wine, lemon juice, mustard, dissolved anchovies, and tomato paste. Mix carefully, then sieve once to make a smooth sauce.
8. Drain the rice and spread it out on a warmed serving platter. Pour the sauce over it and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
9. While the rice cools slightly, fry the tomato cubes quickly in the remaining 3 tablespoons of olive oil for 1 minute. Add the olives and marjoram. Mix in and pour over the rice and sauce.
10. Serve.
